details: Coursework: Thermodynamics I–II, Fluid Dynamics, Heat Transfer, Materials

experience.title: Engineering Intern
bullets: Helped in-source and optimize an injection-molded product stream (~400k units).
Designed alignment cones and authored manufacturing drawings/standards.
Applied DFM for injection molding and ran FEA checks to validate parts.

experience.title: EV Powertrain Lead
bullets: Led EV powertrain development; integrated Drexler differential and Emrax motor.
Built/packaged charging box, HV/LV box, shutdown box; ensured FSAE rule compliance.
Structural analysis in ANSYS; iterative design reduced mass ~30% vs. prior iteration.

experience.title: EV Powertrain Member
bullets: Contributed to design and integration of the team’s first EV powertrain.
Assisted with battery, motor, and control-system integration; collaborated across subsystems.
